title: Highlight text in a document and add a comment as a non-owner of that document
excerpt: Is there a setting to allow a non-owner of a document to highlight text and add a comment? As a document owner you can do that, but non-owners can only add comments without the ability to first highlight text.

posts.author: radmunson (Radu M)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a setting to allow a non-owner of a document to highlight text and add a comment? As a document owner you can do that, but non-owners can only add comments without the ability to first highlight text.
